title: bolanthus graecus
intro: Bolanthus graecus, also known as the Greek yellow teasel or Greek teasel, is a perennial herb belonging to the Thymelaeaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Bolanthus graecus include relieving symptoms of asthma, improving digestion, and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of Bolanthus graecus, such as teas and infusions, can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, and are often used to promote overall well-being.
